title: MAP 6.13: Add cost-governance and kill-switch design
description: Wave 3 from MAP 6.13 plan. Design cost fields, per-task/day budgets, spend-rate circuit breaker, and operator kill-switch before broader runtime autonomy. Read MAP_System/artifacts/planning/map-613-master-implementation-plan.md, MAP_System/events/README.md, MAP_System/shared/hpom.md, and MAP_System/DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md before editing.
acceptance_criteria: Cost spec defines tokens_in, tokens_out, model_tier, estimated_cost, per-task budget, per-day budget, and spend-rate breaker semantics.
Kill-switch spec defines halt flag/storage, who may set/clear it, required events, and how runner/agent-loop should respond.
Design distinguishes cost circuit breaker from failure circuit breaker and records operator-approval paths for budget overrides.
Risk register or risk note captures runaway-spend risk and mitigation.
